name: Summer-Speedy Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions: Cook rice according to package directions; drain. Cut open the bag and empty the contents into a medium bowl. Allow it to cool to room temperature. Stir in yogurt, honey, and cinnamon; cover and chill. Just before serving, layer with fruit or stir in. Makes 4 servings, about 3 1/2 cups pudding.
